PLACEHOLDER_NOTE: This file is a stub so train.py / preflights pass the load_calibrated_threshold() check. The 0.10 value is the same fallback used by build_smoke_trainer when calibration is missing — it is NOT calibrated against the 250-step pilot. Before launching production training jobs, regenerate via:    python analysis/threshold_calibration.py --run-id <pilot-run-id> --project grpo-social-dilemmas --entity suraj_chamakura-university-of-california-berkeley --out configs/calibrated_threshold.json
